name: Kirby's Adventure
description:
Kirby's Adventure is a side-scrolling platformer where the player controls Kirby, a small, pink, spherical creature. The game takes place in Dream Land, which has been plunged into darkness as the Star Rod, the source of dreams, has been stolen and broken into pieces. Kirby must travel across seven distinct worlds, each containing multiple levels, to recover the pieces of the Star Rod and restore dreams to Dream Land.

Kirby's primary ability is to inhale enemies and objects. After inhaling, Kirby can either swallow the object, turning it into a harmless star, or spit it out as a projectile. Certain enemies, when inhaled, will grant Kirby the ability to copy their power. These copied abilities range from offensive attacks like swords, fire breath, and lasers, to defensive abilities like stone form, and mobility powers like the UFO's flight. Kirby can hold only one copy ability at a time. If Kirby is damaged while possessing a copy ability, he will lose it. 

The game features diverse level designs, including standard platforming stages, underwater sections, and vertical scrolling towers. Each world culminates in a boss fight. The environments are varied, ranging from grassy plains and icy mountains to dark caves and amusement parks.

Hidden throughout the levels are various items that replenish Kirby's health or provide temporary invincibility. Additionally, there are secret doors and pathways leading to bonus rooms and other secrets. The game also features mini-games within certain levels that provide opportunities to earn extra lives.

controls.a: Inhale / Use copy ability (when ability is equipped)
controls.s: Spit out inhaled object / Drop copy ability (when ability is equipped)
controls.q: Guard (only when Guard copy ability is equipped)
